title: Fizzy's McTiers Emoji Icons!
description: This resource pack adds emojis that can be pasted into the game and look as if they are the MCTIERS icons. This is very useful for fake montages or just a bit of fun!
body:
**FIZZY'S MCTIERS EMOJI ICONS!**

This resource pack adds emojis that can be pasted into the game and look as if they are the MCTIERS icons. This is very useful for fake montages or just a bit of fun!

Here are the emojis:  
⬇ = **_CPVP_**  
⬆ = **_MACE_**  
⬅ = **_SWORD_**  
➡ = **_UHC_**  
✈ = **_TNTCART_**  
® = **_SMP_**  
❎ = **_NETHPOT_**  
♾ = **_AXE_**   
☹ = **_POT_**   
↪️ = **_BOW_**  
↩️ = **_CREEPER_**  
⤴️ = **_DIAMOND SMP_**  
⤵️ = **_DIAMOND CPVP_**  

**MORE UPDATES TO COME**
**NOT AFFILIATED WITH MCTIERS**

[This is an example of my icons resource pack and the mod "NameSkinChanger" working together.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c15f3b81ff4f23cbef85b034e04dfde7acadd597.png)

By FizzyducksMC!
